# agentimization

> geo audit for agent-ready websites and projects. one command to score how well ai agents can discover, parse, and cite your site.

## docs

- [home](https://agentimization.com/index.md): overview, install, how it works, faq
- [readme](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/antlio/agentimization/main/README.md): repository readme
- [design notes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/antlio/agentimization/main/Design.md): design principles
- [contributing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/antlio/agentimization/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): how to contribute
- [agents.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/antlio/agentimization/main/AGENTS.md): coding-agent guide
- [skill spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/antlio/agentimization/main/skills/agentimization/SKILL.md): claude code skill
- [core changelog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/antlio/agentimization/main/packages/core/CHANGELOG.md): @agentimization/core releases
- [cli changelog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/antlio/agentimization/main/apps/cli/CHANGELOG.md): agentimization cli releases
